title: crstian19/llamit
summary: A VS Code extension to generate semantic commit messages using your local Ollama LLM instance.

title: geeks-accelerator/ollama-herd
summary: Smart inference router that herds your Ollama instances into one endpoint. Auto-discovers nodes via mDNS, scores them on thermal state, memory fit, queue depth, latency history, and role affinity, then routes each request to the optimal device. OpenAI-compatible API with real-time dashboard.

title: marc-shade/Ollama-Workbench
summary: A comprehensive platform for managing, testing, and leveraging Ollama AI models with advanced features for customization, workflow automation, and collaborative development.

title: wil-pe/CATAI
summary: Virtual desktop pet cats for macOS — pixel art cats that live on your dock and chat with you via Ollama LLM.

title: vachhanidhyey/llm_intercept
summary: 🚀 Intercept and log LLM calls to build fine-tuning datasets for compact models, enabling cost-effective and efficient AI training.

title: uxlabspk/ArcCode
summary: A TypeScript multi-agent orchestration framework for local LLMs via Ollama.

title: ypollak2/llm-router
summary: Smart LLM router for Claude Code — auto-picks cheapest model per task, routes within Claude subscription first. 70-85% cost savings.

title: JetBrains/koog
summary: Koog is a JVM (Java and Kotlin) framework for building predictable, fault-tolerant and enterprise-ready AI agents across all platforms – from backend services to Android and iOS, JVM, and even in-browser environments. Koog is based on our AI products expertise and provides proven solutions for complex LLM and AI problems

title: Abrechen2/sublarr
summary: Self-hosted subtitle manager & LLM translator for anime and media — *arr-compatible, fully local

title: JosephOIbrahim/Comfy-Cozy
summary: AI co-pilot for ComfyUI — 113 tools for workflow authoring, model provisioning, and iterative rendering. Multi-provider (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Ollama). Ships as MCP server or standalone CLI.

title: MichaelLod/byoky
summary: Open-source AI wallet — your keys never leave your device. 15 providers, 2 lines to integrate, cross-provider translation. Browser extension + iOS + Android.

title: kagura-ai/memory-cloud
summary: Adaptive AI Memory Platform — Self-hosted MCP server that gets smarter as you use it. Hybrid search, neural memory graph, AI reranking, and web UI. Built with FastAPI, Next.js, PostgreSQL, and Qdrant.

title: joriener/Audio_Transkription_Notes_Pipeline
summary: Audio transcription with speaker diarization and AI-generated meeting or webinar notes. Powered by WhisperX and Anthropic Claude or Ollama.

title: sklaff2a-gif/promethee-nexus
summary: Systeme multi-agents IA autonome avec cerveau bio-inspire : Brain VM, Global Workspace (Baars), connectivity matrix, LIF scoring, Hebbian contextuel, signaux descendants, rappel causal, prediction RPE. 20+ organes (cardiac, prefrontal, dopamine, thalamus...). Python/FastAPI/Ollama, single PC.

title: Elysia20220909/ElysiaAI
summary: ElysiaAI：高品質なパフォーマンスと拡張可能なアーキテクチャに焦点を当てた、高度なAI開発フレームワーク

title: luoboask/evo-agents
summary: Complete Workspace Template for OpenClaw - Full agent lifecycle with unified memory system (Markdown + SQLite), self-evolution, RAG. Not for SubAgent/Skill use.

title: vroomfondel/dgxarley
summary: Ansible playbooks for a 3-node K3s cluster with NVIDIA DGX Spark nodes for distributed LLM inference

title: sparksbenjamin/Vanguarr
summary: Scout of the ARR stack: self-hosted Jellyfin recommendation engine that profiles watch history and auto-requests high-confidence media through Jellyseerr/Seer.

title: Jo4ge/multi-agent-chat
summary: 🤖 Engage in dynamic conversations with multiple AI personalities in a group chat, enhancing your interactive experience with real-time responses.
